response.original_title: Office bitch mesmerized into making sex tape
response.overview: Krissy is the HOTTEST woman in the office, but she is an uptight BITCH. She has shut down every guy at work that even asks her out for coffee. Nathan on the other hand has a plan. After months he has her convinced he isn’t like the other guys, and, when she is back at his place he uses an entrancement technique he has practiced for exactly this moment. It isn’t just enough to nail the office hottie, he has to be able to tell all about it, and make sure she can’t get him fired for sexual harassment after the fact. After all, he would have to show everyone the tape as proof.
response.title: Office bitch mesmerized into making sex tape
